name: Figma API pi extension — tool implementation

description: V0: Core extension with 23 Figma REST API tools, OAuth+PAT auth, rate-limit aware fetch, response truncation, and /figma-auth command. API auth validated against live Figma API as MOIKAPY. Structure validated via regex scan of figma-extension.ts.

V1: Added 3 smart composite tools — figma_export_assets (downloads images locally), figma_extract_tokens (design tokens from styles+variables), figma_screens_summary (high-level page/frame overview). Structural validation confirms 26 registered tools.

asi.next: Test export_assets and screens_summary against real file; add README; push to GitHub

description: Added 7 write tools: update_comment, get_comment_reactions, post_comment_reaction, delete_comment_reaction, put_variables, put_dev_resource, post_dev_resources (bulk). Total 33 tools covering all Figma REST API read + write endpoints.
DRY refactor: extracted makeReadTool/makeWriteTool factories. File went from ~1131 lines to ~540. 33 tools remain intact. Regex validation updated for factory patterns.

asi.next: Push to GitHub; add design-to-code command/wizard

description: Added figma_get_comment (single comment read). Total 34 tools covering all practical Figma REST API read/write endpoints. Design-to-code wizard command added in previous commit.

asi.next: Update README + push. Test design-to-code wizard with real file key.

description: Updated README with full 34-tool reference table, /figma-auth and /figma-to-react commands, GitHub repo URL, and npm/git install instructions. Pushed to GitHub.

asi.next: Test figma-to-react wizard with real file key; polish asset downloads in wizard

description: Wizard polish: asset download to local figma-assets dir, design-data JSON written to disk, ctx.signal for cancellation. All 34 tools validated. Extension pushed to GitHub.

asi.next: Test wizard with real file key; consider npm publish

description: Added companion plugin architecture: WebSocket relay (ws-relay.ts) + Figma plugin (companion-plugin/) + 8 pi tools for direct design creation (createFrame, createRectangle, createText, setFill, setPosition, setSize, deleteNode, getPageNodes). Total 42 tools.

asi.next: Test relay + improve moikas.com design with plugin tools

description: Wizard and screens_summary fixed to discover RECTANGLE/COMPONENT/INSTANCE/SECTION/GROUP nodes. Posted 4 design review comments to user's moikas.com Figma file. Pushed to GitHub.

asi.next: Update README with companion plugin instructions; test relay end-to-end

description: Git history cleaned: removed .env from all commits via filter-branch + force push. .env added to .gitignore. User should rotate Figma tokens since they were previously exposed.

asi.next: Generate improved landing page for moikas.com; rotate Figma tokens

description: Posted improved moikas.com landing page React+Tailwind design to the user's Figma file (comment ID 1732819900). Clean git history.

asi.next: Create examples/ directory with code; add more plugin commands
